description: The luxe comfort and rugged styling of timberland's shoes are now replicated in its sandals. Wear these with off-duty ensembles for optimal comfort, without compromising on style. This subtle hued floaters can also be worn as slip-on sandals with its removable back strap.UpperLeather straps over the forefoot and around the heel to lock the foot in place with Velcro closuresCurved and textured footbed with printed brandingOutsoleTPR outsole with nubs and lugs for grip and tractionshoe careRub surface with a soft, damp cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
